title: Into the Slot
description: A hiker walks deeper into a narrow slot canyon, rust-colored walls catching midday light.

images.alt: Hiker walking into a narrow slot canyon with orange walls

story: Big Bend hides slot canyons in unexpected places, narrow passages carved by flash floods over millennia. Susan found this one on a backcountry hike and waited for a fellow hiker to walk into frame. The rust and orange tones here became the warm accent colors throughout the Burro design.
leadTimeNote: Archival pigment print on cotton rag. Ships flat within 5 business days.
